name: New Potato Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 Tablespoon dill or chives (dried may be used in smaller amounts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Slice potatoes about 1/4 inch thick.
3. Choose a casserole dish that is wider than it is tall so most of the slices can fit across the bottom.
4. Butter the bottom of the casserole dish and place the potato slices in the pan.
5. Thinly slice the onion and scatter it under and over the potatoes.
6. Sprinkle salt and pepper over the potatoes; dot with butter chunks.
7. Cover tightly with aluminum foil and bake for 1 to 1 1/2 hours, or until potatoes are tender and slightly browned.
8. Remove foil, top with a generous dollop of sour cream, and sprinkle with herbs before serving.
9. Serve in individual portions with a bowl of the remaining sour cream and herbs on the side.
Serves 8.
